name: Christian Scherer
currentRole: Chief Commercial Officer and Head of Airbus International
connectionToCompany: Oversees commercial relationships with major aircraft lessors and operators including FTAI Aviation, an FTAI subsidiary that acquires and leases Airbus narrowbody aircraft engines and airframes
sourceNote: Publicly identified as Airbus CCO in press releases and Airbus leadership pages

name: Wouter Van Wersch
currentRole: Executive Vice President, Airbus — Head of Europe and Asia-Pacific Sales
connectionToCompany: Manages aircraft sales to leasing entities and operators relevant to FTAI's aviation asset portfolio, particularly narrowbody A320 family transactions
sourceNote: Named in Airbus press releases and organizational announcements as EVP Sales

name: Jean-Brice Dumont
currentRole: Executive Vice President, Engineering — Airbus Commercial Aircraft
formerRole: Head of Aircraft Systems at Airbus
connectionToCompany: Technical authority for A320 family aircraft which underpin FTAI Aviation's core leasing and MRO strategy around CFM56 and LEAP engines
sourceNote: Identified in Airbus engineering leadership communications and aviation industry publications

name: Francois Caudron
currentRole: Vice President, Customer Affairs — Airbus Commercial Aircraft
formerRole: Director of Contracts and Airline Relations at Airbus
connectionToCompany: Manages post-delivery support and customer affairs for operators and lessors in FTAI's portfolio who operate Airbus narrowbody aircraft
sourceNote: Identified through Airbus customer affairs division public documentation and aviation conference bios

name: Benoit de Saint-Exupery
currentRole: Vice President, Aircraft Finance and Leasing — Airbus
formerRole: Director of Aviation Finance at Airbus Financial Services
connectionToCompany: Directly interfaces with aircraft lessors and infrastructure investors such as FTAI on financing structures, sale-leaseback transactions, and narrowbody fleet acquisition financing
sourceNote: Identified through Airbus Financial Services public materials and aviation finance conference participation
